name: Partner Access for Merchant Site
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As an approved Neto by Maropost partner, you will provide services to Neto merchants, which may require access to their control panel, their site template files via SFTP, or both."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Requesting Access to Merchant Site"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The process to have access granted to you for a merchant\u2019s control panel and/or site template files is as follows:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inform the merchant that they will need to submit the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://netoecommerce.wufoo.com/forms/request-partner-access", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Request Webstore Access"}]}, {"text": " form."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Upon submission, the request is reviewed by the Neto partner team and approved if the relevant verification criteria are met."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once approved, you will receive an email notification informing you that you now have access to the merchant\u2019s site."}]}]}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Requests are processed between 9am-5pm, Mon-Fri, and will normally be completed within 1 business day. If your request has not been processed within this time frame and you would like to follow up, please feel free to contact the Partner Support team."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For your security and the security of the merchant you are working with, Neto does not recommend that you request a merchant to set up a staff user account for you to gain access to their control panel or site template files. Instead, you should follow the process outlined above at all times."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have been granted partner access, you can log into the merchants control panel or SFTP server using your existing Partner User credentials."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reach out to Partner Support if you require additional Partner Users created."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you require personal partner credentials for a particular merchants project - for example, a password protected import/export feed - these must be arranged and provided by the merchant. Note that control panel access and SFTP access are separate in this instance."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Troubleshoot Login Issues"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you are having issue logging in, try the options below:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Check if you can access a store that you know you have access to"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reset your password to sync your account across all stores you have access to\n\nTo reset your password, follow the steps below:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/profile/manage-password", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "https://www.netohq.com/profile/manage-password"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select \"Partner Account\"."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your email address."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click \"Request Password Reset\"."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You will receive an email with instructions. Follow the prompts to reset your password."}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Once the reset process is completed, please allow 15-45 minutes for the password to update across all sites you have been granted access to by merchants.\u00a0"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. Reach out to Partner Support to review setup."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
